# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- First general instruction
- Second general instruction
- Prefer autonomous execution on tasks: continue implementation until the feature work is done without stopping for intermediate confirmation.
- When progress stalls, avoid repetitive status updates and repeated reformulations; provide a concise conclusion or the next concrete action instead of looping.

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules
- Follow naming conventions for dotnet and Blazor projects
- Use MudBlazor components (no raw HTML), and MudBlazor Layout components for page structure
- Avoid inline CSS styles
- Implement component decomposition for major UI sections
- Utilize async I/O with CancellationToken
- Apply LINQ extension-method syntax

## Project-Specific Rules
- Always read .specify/memory/constitution.md at the start of any work session on the Boxcars project. It defines non-negotiable principles.
- Use the .specify agent when doing work on the Boxcars project.
- Ensure gameplay fidelity to original Rail Baron rules.
